name: Gulf Shores / Pensacola West KOA Holiday
summary_text: A bayfront KOA Holiday on Perdido Bay offering waterfront RV sites, a private fishing pier, marina access, a year-round pool and hot tub, and a convenient basecamp for exploring Gulf Shores, Pensacola, and Perdido Key.

amenities.campStore: Office with Firewood, Ice and Basic Supplies
otherAmenities: Clubhouse with Kitchen and Pool Table
Marina with Covered and Uncovered Boat Slips

siteFeatures.level: Mostly level RV sites with back-in, pull-through and waterfront options.
otherNotes: Bayview and waterfront campsites are available.
Premium sites can accommodate RVs up to approximately 70 feet.
Tree cover and site spacing vary throughout the campground.
The campground is in Lillian, Alabama, between Gulf Shores and Pensacola.

starlink.notes: Open bayfront sites should have fewer obstructions, while sites beneath mature trees may experience interruptions.

activities.fishing: Private Fishing Pier on Perdido Bay
activities.biking: Campground Roads and Nearby Coastal Trails

shopping: Shopping in Pensacola and Gulf Shores

petNotes.walkingAreas: Campground roads and waterfront areas provide convenient places for leashed walks.
petNotes.dogPark: A partially covered KampK9 dog park is available.
petNotes.dogFriendlyTrails: Leashed pets are allowed in many nearby parks and coastal walking areas, subject to local restrictions.
petNotes.petRestrictions: Pets must remain leashed outside the dog park. Beach access rules vary by location.
petNotes.hazards: Watch for heat, hot pavement, mosquitoes, biting insects, snakes and possible wildlife near the bay.
petNotes.notes: The covered dog-park area is especially helpful during hot Gulf Coast weather. Check beach rules before bringing pets on a day trip.

tripTips: Book a bayview site early if waterfront views are important to you.
Bring insect repellent, especially during warm and humid weather.
Verify beach pet rules before planning an outing with your dogs.
Use the campground as a basecamp for both the Alabama Gulf Coast and Pensacola.
Call emergency veterinary facilities before driving to confirm availability.
Prepare for possible coastal storms and strong winds.
